title: 50+ Claude AI Prompt Templates for Content Creators, Marketers, Bloggers - Copy Paste Ready AI Prompts, Digital Download
description:
50+ tested Claude AI prompts organized by use case. Copy, paste, fill in the blanks, get results worth publishing.

WHAT YOU GET:

- 50+ prompt templates across 8 categories
- Blog content (8 prompts): articles, listicles, how-to guides, comparison posts
- Email marketing (7 prompts): welcome sequences, campaigns, cold outreach
- Social media (8 prompts): X threads, LinkedIn posts, Instagram captions
- Sales copy (6 prompts): landing pages, product descriptions, pricing pages
- SEO (5 prompts): meta descriptions, FAQ content, keyword clustering
- Business ops (6 prompts): meeting summaries, SOPs, competitive analysis
- Editing (5 prompts): tone adjustment, simplification, brand voice matching
- Strategy (5 prompts): content calendars, audience analysis, competitor teardowns

EACH PROMPT INCLUDES:
- Copy-paste template with [VARIABLE] placeholders
- Variable guide explaining what to fill in
- Context instructions for better results
- Real example output
- Customization tips for different industries

FORMAT: PDF (printable, 50+ pages)
FREE UPDATES: New prompts added regularly

Optimized specifically for Claude AI (Anthropic). These are not generic prompts - they leverage Claude's specific strengths for better output quality.
